note: Sprint 5.1 — Trinity Proof Registry v0. New canonical registry JSON+MD records the on-chain Trinity bundles (Kalgoorlie Phase 1 at block #8085, txid d68678b5...). New scripts/trinity/trinity_proof_registry.py builder + scripts/trinity/verify_trinity_registry.py offline verifier (13 closed checks R1-R13). New tests/trinity/test_trinity_proof_registry.py (32 tests covering determinism, validation, host-path leak guard, no-broadcast static surface, verifier tampering detection). Trinity page gains a Public Registry Entry panel near First Proof Bundle, plus a local-verify recipe. Explorer Trinity banner gains a one-line Registry: kalgoorlie_phase1 magenta indicator under the Discovery Engine heading. NO consensus / RPC / node / miner / wallet / wire-format change. NO auto-broadcast; registry only documents operator-driven manual registrations after the fact. Living on branch trinity/proof-registry-public-v0; not merged to main.
